mapper.select: SELECT id, steering_id, version, title, content, tags, keywords, change_log, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId} ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT MAX(version) FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_version WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId}

SELECT s.id AS steering_id, s.title AS steering_title, s.status AS steering_status, c.name AS category_name, s.current_version, v.id AS version_id, v.version AS pending_version, v.title AS pending_title, v.change_log, v.status AS version_status, v.updated_at AS submitted_at, (s.status = 'active') AS is_revision FROM steering_version v JOIN steering s ON s.id = v.steering_id AND s.deleted = false LEFT JOIN steering_category c ON c.id = s.category_id WHERE v.status IN ('pending_review', 'approved') ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering_version v JOIN steering s ON s.id = v.steering_id AND s.deleted = false WHERE v.status IN ('pending_review', 'approved')
